resources.string:
Unable to read critical hardware monitoring data (e.g., GPU load or APU IPS).

Reason: Android system restricts third-party apps from accessing low-level nodes by default.

Solution: Please execute the following ADB commands via a computer to lift the restrictions:

adb root
adb shell setenforce 0
adb shell chmod 644 /sys/kernel/ged/hal/gpu_utilization
